title: Complete iptables Tutorial: Beginner to Advanced
content: Master the Linux firewall from basics to advanced configurations. Learn to protect your server with practical, hands-on examples including installation, rule management, NAT, port forwarding, and security best practices.
author: E-Learning Platform

title: Practical Linux Firewalls: iptables, nftables, UFW & firewalld
content: A concise practical guide to Linux firewall tools with commands and example outputs. Covers iptables, nftables, ufw, and firewalld plus best practices.
author: E-Learning Platform

title: Complete Guide: Hosting React + PostgreSQL on Local VMs with Internet Access
content: Learn to deploy a full-stack React application with PostgreSQL database on local VMs using VirtualBox, configure firewalls, setup SSH tunnels, port forwarding with TP-Link Deco router, and expose your app to the internet securely with HTTPS.
author: E-Learning Platform
